info.name: Workato Event Streams Public API
info.description:
The Workato Event Streams Public API enables HTTP-based clients to publish and consume messages from event topics. It supports single message publish, batch publish of up to 100 messages, and message consumption with optional long polling. This API uses region-specific base URLs and is separate from the Developer API's event streams management endpoints. Rate limit is 60 requests per minute with a maximum payload size of 1 MB.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workato Support

item.name: Workato Consume Messages from a Topic

variable.description: (Required) Unique integer identifier of the event topic.

request.description: Retrieves messages from an event topic. Supports filtering by message ID or timestamp, configurable batch sizes up to 50, and long polling with timeouts up to 60 seconds. Returns at most 50 messages per request.

response.name: A batch of messages from the topic.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication token is missing or invalid.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The specified topic was not found.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Rate limit of 60 requests per minute has been exceeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Workato Publish a Message to a Topic

variable.description: (Required) Unique integer identifier of the event topic.

request.description: Publishes a single message to an event topic. The message payload must conform to the topic's defined schema. Maximum payload size is 1 MB.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The request payload is invalid or does not match the topic schema.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Authentication token is missing or invalid.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: The specified topic was not found.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Rate limit of 60 requests per minute has been exceeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Workato Publish a Batch of Messages to a Topic

variable.description: (Required) Unique integer identifier of the event topic.

request.description: Publishes multiple messages to an event topic in a single request. Supports up to 100 messages per batch. Each payload must conform to the topic's schema. Partial failures are indicated in the response.

response.name: Batch publish results with individual message IDs.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
